creator: Luigi.Rizzo@prova.iet.unipi.it
text:
The sio probes cause the screen to become blank. Other than that, the boot
process continues regularly and the system seems to work. But no
screen output is available.

Fix: 

Not available yet.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just boot the OS.
	Disable the sio probes and you see the screen output. Enable them,
	and the screen becomes blank at the first sio probe.
